tasks.title: Tighten create cohort validation and form identity
tasks.objective: Update cohort creation so recurrence, first-meeting timing, meeting-link provider allowlisting, and creator identity presentation match the feedback.
authority: Preserve the rule that firstMeetingAt must be after the 14-day quorum window.
Allow daily recurrence as a first-class recurrence option.
Accept private meeting links only from Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Discord, and Slack domains.
Remove the visible Creator selector from the create form without allowing participants to create through the UI.
Do not add feedback tasks to the main task ledger.
acceptance_criteria: The create form no longer renders the first visible Creator select field.
Cohort creation still assigns the event to a creator under the current auth/demo assumption.
`daily` appears as a recurrence option and validates as a repeating recurrence.
First meeting UI and backend validation reject dates at or before the two-week quorum window.
Backend validation rejects private meeting links outside the allowed Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Discord, and Slack domains.
Focused tests cover successful and rejected meeting-link domains, daily recurrence, creator-field removal, and first-meeting timing.
verification: Run focused domain and create-flow tests.
Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
tasks.area: create form, validation, demo auth boundary, meeting links
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when creation form behavior and validation rules match the feedback and verification passes.
